summary: Three preventable delivery faults were found: the Symphony clone names upstream as origin and the BOS fork as fork; an untemplated PR body failed CI; and a temporary copied human token became stale while the canonical secure human.env remained valid.
action: Resolve worktree bases from the BOS repository clone URL rather than a remote name, run the repository PR-body validator before creating or updating a PR, and make recovery/human-action launchers read the canonical secure human environment directly without temporary token copies.
